goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 3' and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 3 and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should be in the type of guesthouse
Make sure you get whether they have internet
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
Make sure you get attraction type
